# ConformanceRequirements.RequiredClientRequestMetaKeys property

The fields a client MUST include in every request's per-request metadata (spec §29.3 item 1, R-29.3-a). Exposed for a conformance harness to assert presence.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> RequiredClientRequestMetaKeys { get; }
```
